category_sources: Official GNU CLISP page describes CLISP as an ANSI Common Lisp implementation.

docs_sources: Official GNU CLISP page links the UNIX manual page and Implementation Notes.
Official GNU manual page documents invocation, options, and environment.
repo_sources: Official GNU CLISP page links 'Check out or browse CLISP source tree from the Mercurial repository' on SourceForge.
tags_sources: Official GNU manual page describes clisp as an ANSI Common Lisp compiler, interpreter, and debugger.
